CustomField.formula: if(BEGINS(TEXT(leaseworks__Transaction_Type__c),'Adjustment - '), IF(leaseworks__Y_Hidden_Adjust_Accrued_Amount__c,leaseworks__Supplemental_Rent_Adjustment_Amount__c,null), CASE(TEXT(leaseworks__Transaction_Type__c) ,'MR Accrued', IF(leaseworks__Utilization_Status__c=='Approved By Lessor', IF( AND( ISPICKVAL( leaseworks__Supplemental_Rent_Utilization__r.leaseworks__Supplemental_Rent_Type__c , 'End of Lease Adjustment') , ISPICKVAL( leaseworks__Supplemental_Rent_Utilization__r.leaseworks__Utilization_Report__r.leaseworks__Type__c , 'True Up Gross')) , leaseworks__Supplemental_Rent_Utilization__r.leaseworks__Effective_Difference__c , leaseworks__Supplemental_Rent_Utilization__r.leaseworks__Total_Maintenance_Reserve__c) , null) ,'MR Claim Accrued', IF(leaseworks__Claim_Status__c=='Approved', leaseworks__Claim_Amount__c, null) ,leaseworks__Amount_Invoiced__c))
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Auto-calculated field, showing accrued amount as per the source Document. This amount affects Running Balance (Accrued). NULL for transactions updating only cash balance.
CustomField.label: Amount (Accrued)
